ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the book (e.g., fiction, science fiction) */,
  "in_print" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the book is currently in print */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* The company that published the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* The edition number of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language in which the book is written */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* The number of pages in the book */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the book */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the book cover image */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status indicating whether the book is available, on loan, or reserved */,
  "location" TEXT /* The physical location of the book in the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., librarian, administrator, borrower) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Secure storage of user passwords */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the user registered with the library */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date the user last logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowing_history" (
  "borrow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrowing record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "borrow_date" TEXT /* Date the book was borrowed */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the book was returned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the book is due for return */,
  "fine_amount" TEXT /* Amount of fine if the book was returned late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowing_history_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Date the book is available for pickup */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings_and_reviews" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating and review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_and_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_and_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
